question.text:
Dear @#CUL Allegro Support <mail

 

Please help to check and advise why below WRS tariff for 40RH cannot be captured?

 



 

Thank you.

 

Bob Wu / 吴梓玮

Long Haul Trade

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 

200 Cantonment Road #11-01,

Southpoint, Singapore 089763



 


Subject: RE: <CCT> FREIGHT AGREEMENT -CUL YANGPU 2611N- CUYP2611N- LH- ETD 21 MAR 2026

answer.text:
Dear Bob,

Both highlighted lines meet the conditions, and No. 2 takes priority since it has an extra condition (POD = SA). 
You can raise No. 7’s priority by adding the same condition (POD = SA).




Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 17:54

Cc: Snider Yu/CUL-VN <snideryu@culines.com>, #CU
